item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested N+1 split, explicitly names the three prior downstream route/split patches as the repeated pattern, rejects a permanent gift-handling port as the default, and moves upstream to unified front-desk routing rules with consolidation, metrics, and a rollback deadline. The temporary emergency exception is bounded and not treated as a new baseline, so the fail signal is not present."}
